top_findings.title: ATDD acceptance suite fails: 16 of 24 tests fail
top_findings.evidence: pytest run of test_app.py: 16 failed, 8 passed. POST/PUT tests use data=<dict> with content_type="application/json" (e.g. test_app.py:66-70, 101-105, 262-266) which Werkzeug form-encodes; app.py:34 request.get_json() then rejects the body (400/None). Agent diagnosed this in _agent_stdout.log ('use json=payload instead of data=payload') but its fix write was refused by the sandbox.
top_findings.suggestion: Replace `data=payload, content_type='application/json'` with `json=payload` at the ~26 affected sites in test_app.py so bodies are sent as JSON. Under ATDD the passing suite is the deliverable.

top_findings.title: Required README.md deliverable is absent
top_findings.evidence: Directory listing of run_dir shows no README.md; REQUIREMENTS.json R11 requires a README with setup and run instructions.
top_findings.suggestion: Add README.md documenting `pip install -r requirements.txt`, `python app.py`, and `pytest` usage.
